summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Parent Progress Dashboard feature. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all dashboard features are working correctly: Progress button on child cards, ParentProgressDashboard page with all visual charts and data displays.

issues: Minor: Age category display shows '14' instead of 'Age 14' in subtitle (shows 'Age 14 • 14')

passed_tests: GET /api/children/{id}/analytics returns 200
Analytics response has child info (id, name, age, age_category)
Analytics has improvement metrics (total_stars, accuracy, current_streak, etc.)
Analytics has module_performance data for bar chart (4 modules with stars and colors)
Analytics has weak_topics identification with mistake counts
Analytics has daily_activity 14-day calendar data
Analytics has achievement_timeline with badge info and dates
Analytics has progress_timeline for area chart
Analytics has summary with performance indicators
Analytics requires authentication (401 without token)
Analytics returns 404 for invalid child
Analytics returns 404 for other user's child
Accuracy calculation is correct (50% = 7/14)
Module stars sum equals total stars (8)
Unreviewed calculation is correct (mistakes - reviewed)
UI: Progress button (chart icon) visible on premium child cards
UI: ParentProgressDashboard page loads at /progress/:childId
UI: Header shows child name and age
UI: Back button navigates to dashboard
UI: Accuracy summary card shows 50% with 'Needs Practice'
UI: Current Streak card shows 1 days with 'Getting Started'
UI: Badges Earned card shows 3
UI: Questions Today card shows 14 with Best: 14
UI: Performance by Module bar chart shows Addition with 8 stars
UI: Progress Over Time area chart with milestone annotations
UI: Daily Activity 14-day calendar with practiced/missed indicators (1/14 days)
UI: Areas Needing Attention shows Addition with 4 mistakes (4 new badge)
UI: Recent Achievements shows 5 Stars, Never Give Up, First Star badges with dates
UI: Learning Summary shows Total Questions (14), Correct Answers (7), Longest Streak (1 days), Mistakes Reviewed (0)
action_items: Minor: Fix age category display in header subtitle - currently shows 'Age 14 • 14' instead of 'Age 14 • Ages 14'
seed_data_creation: Namal has: 8 total stars (all in Addition), 14 total attempts, 7 correct (50% accuracy), 3 badges (first_star, five_stars, never_give_up), 4 mistakes in Addition topic, 1 day streak
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parent Progress Dashboard feature fully tested and working. API endpoint: GET /api/children/{id}/analytics returns comprehensive analytics data including module_performance, weak_topics, daily_activity, achievement_timeline, progress_timeline, and summary. Dashboard uses recharts for BarChart (module performance) and AreaChart (progress over time) visualizations. Progress button (purple chart icon) appears next to Learn button for premium subscribers on Dashboard child cards.

progress_button.status: Working - purple chart icon (BarChart3) next to Learn button for premium subscribers

summary_cards.accuracy: Working - shows percentage with performance indicator (Needs Practice/Good/Excellent)
summary_cards.current_streak: Working - shows days with status (Getting Started/Building Momentum/On Fire!)
summary_cards.badges_earned: Working - shows count with active days
summary_cards.questions_today: Working - shows count with best day record

performance_by_module.status: Working - shows stars per module (Counting, Numbers, Addition, Shapes) with colors

progress_over_time.status: Working - shows star progression with milestone annotations (badge names)

daily_activity.status: Working - 14-day calendar grid with green checkmarks for practiced days, gray for missed
daily_activity.legend: Practiced (green) / Missed (gray) with X/14 days count

areas_needing_attention.status: Working - shows weak topics sorted by mistake count with progress bar and 'X new' badge

recent_achievements.status: Working - shows badge icons (⭐/🔥/💪/🔄/📚) with names and earned dates

learning_summary.status: Working - purple gradient section with Total Questions, Correct Answers, Longest Streak, Mistakes Reviewed
